observation.summary: The distribution host entrypoint and store-channel policy overview, review/demo, open question, and versioning pages remained manually edited prose while invariants, local IPC, policy table, and privacy metadata evidence were already generated.

hypothesis.summary: A distribution-host manifest can generate the C11 entrypoint and store-channel wrapper docs while delegating policy-table and metadata details to their existing dedicated evidence tools.

execution.summary: Generate the root, store-channel policy index, review/demo, open question, and versioning docs from executable page fragments and source anchors.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, missing source anchors, missing workflow wiring, and missing coverage registration while rechecking adjacent C11 evidence.

retrospective.summary: The C11 distribution host root and store-channel wrapper pages now become generated evidence without duplicating storecontract or privacy metadata ownership.

evidence.proves: distribution host root and store-channel wrapper docs are generated and source anchors still exist
review/demo, store policy, API, and CLI behavior still match the generated boundary
public CI uploads distribution host docs evidence
